ohtani.title: Shohei Ohtani leads shutout win over Giants
ohtani.blurb: Shohei Ohtani fans eight over seven innings and the Dodgers hit back-to-back home runs in a 4-0 shutout win vs. the Giants

imanaga.title: Mike Yastrzemski hits go-ahead double in Braves' win
imanaga.blurb: Mike Yastrzemski comes up clutch with a go-ahead double in the 8th inning to back a lockdown bullpen performance in the Braves' 4-1 win over the Cubs

suzuki.title: Ian Happ powers Cubs to a 2-0 win over the Braves
suzuki.blurb: Ian Happ crushes a home run to lead the Cubs to a 2-0 win over the Braves

yoshida.title: Kyle Schwarber, Jesús Luzardo lead Phillies' 3-1 win
yoshida.blurb: Kyle Schwarber hits a two-run home run and Jesús Luzardo throws six scoreless innings in the Phillies' 3-1 win over the Red Sox

okamoto.title: Varsho hits a walk-off grand slam in Blue Jays' win
okamoto.blurb: Daulton Varsho crushes a walk-off grand slam in the 10th, and Dylan Cease strikes out nine in the Blue Jays' win 5-3 over the Rays

murakami.title: Randal Grichuk, Anthony Kay lead White Sox to 6-2 win
murakami.blurb: Randal Grichuk homers in a four-RBI game and Anthony Kay strikes out four as the White Sox sweep the Royals, 6-2

matsui.title: Luis Rengifo, Kyle Harrison lead Brewers in 7-1 win
matsui.blurb: Luis Rengifo drives in three runs and Kyle Harrison tosses five scoreless innings to lead the Brewers to a 7-1 win over the Padres
